hero_subtitle: SFTY streamlines compliance workflows to lower false positives and manual review costs while enhancing audit readiness and oversight across digital asset risk operations.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams expend significant time investigating alerts that do not represent true risks, creating a heavy manual workload. This inflates operational costs and reduces executive clarity on effective risk controls across compliance workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects alert signals, provider checks and case management into one operational workflow that reduces manual reviews while preserving audit evidence for clearer executive risk visibility.
workflow_title: From provider checks to risk and decision review
workflow_description: SFTY moves discrete provider checks through risk scoring, rules application, case creation, review workflows and decision logging to control false positive costs.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another provider. Clearer compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into unified workflows, decisions, cases and evidence, giving executives clear visibility and control over compliance risks and operational costs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with provider-neutral orchestration and audit-ready evidence to enhance bank due diligence and secure enterprise deployment at scale.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY reduce false positives and compliance workload
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows improve false positive review
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports compliance cost control
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for scalable risk control oversight
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY reduce compliance costs?
faq_1_answer: SFTY reduces compliance costs by consolidating fragmented alerts and provider outputs into structured workflows, lowering manual review time and improving decision consistency for digital asset compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage false positive alerts?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes and prioritizes false positive alerts using configurable rules and AI-assisted review, helping teams focus on high-risk cases while reducing workload and operational bottlenecks.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence in a controlled environment, enabling audit-ready reviews and clear traceability across compliance processes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening providers into one compliance operating layer, maintaining existing integrations while adding case and rule management capabilities.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but sits above them, turning their outputs into structured workflows, evidence packages and regulatory reports for scalable compliance operations.
final_title: Manage false positives with structured workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY supports visibility, decision clarity and audit-ready evidence to reduce compliance cost and operational risk.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
